# AGENTS.md (template)

This guide explains area conventions and common tasks for a subfolder.

## Area
- Name: {{AREA_NAME}}
- Source dir: {{AREA_DIR}}

## Common commands
- Typecheck/build: `npm --prefix {{FRONTEND_DIR}} run typecheck` (example)
- Tests: `pytest {{TESTS_DIR}}` or `npm --prefix {{FRONTEND_DIR}} run test`

## Ownership
- Primary: @owner
- Secondary: @team

(Instantiate this template under `frontend/AGENTS.md`, `src/AGENTS.md`, or `tests/AGENTS.md`.)
